reviews.review_title: Smooth gameplay; little light on content
reviews.review_description:
This has all the elements of a top-shelf platformer/swinging game. The graphics are beautiful and sharp (unfortunately there isn't much opportunity in-game to stop and look around, but that's a consequence of fast gameplay), the gameplay is smooth and mechanics are consistent, and the level design is creative. 

I wish there was a little more content; the game is advertised as having 24 levels including challenge levels,but I only see 11 - maybe those challenge levels are unlocked once completing the campaign? The Zen mode is a nice touch but it would be better if the levels were not just repeats of the campaign...could it be possible to create an endless Zen level?

A 3-tiered star system for finishing levels under specific time marks would be nice, and maybe a few more collectibles per level. So, all in all, Straylight just needs a little bit more Straylight. Otherwise there's so much to like here!

The dev, reached out to me regarding his mechanics in this game and motion sickness and as I suffer really bad vertigo so I was questioning whether a swinging game would be good for me , 

But I played for hours and never broke a sweat 

I love this game and you will to

reviews.review_title: Fun and challenging with rad soundtrack
reviews.review_description: It’s easy to pick up but hard to put down! Great physics and the levels get increasingly difficult with new threats and dangers around every corner. The soundtrack goes great with the gameplay! What a fun way to really be immersed in vr. Must play!

Straylight is a fast Spiderman like swinging game in space. You will race through parkour like levels at extreme speeds. The controls are very easy to use, and the swinging motions feel great. The levels are beautiful and full of color. You don't have time to take in the sights though. You have seconds to plan what the next orb you are going to grapple onto to is and get to the check points. 

You will feel like you are moving through space and get a nice rush from the game. It is a great feeling. The voice that talks to you during gameplay is very comical, and you never know what they are going to say.

If you are fan of Spiderman swinging type game, racing through space or parkour gaming, you will want to check this one out. Over all it was a great VR experience. 

Watch my preview here,
https://youtu.be/9OlQvnDIhLI

Being new to VR this game was a great introduction. The game has great movement and physics, all while maintaining a comfortable gaming experience. The game content itself is fun and challenging, with good replay ability as well!

Gameplay design at its best with intuitive and single use controls.  Zen, X and ghost modes not found on similar apps such as Beatsaber make this game a must have for all levels of player age and skill levels.
Sling through space kind of like spiderman with energy beams and listen to cool music while doing so!
